_comment_: SH_PROXIMAL (Pyrcz 2004) — proximal sand-rich sheets with very wide channels and aggressive in-belt avulsion stacking many channels per level. See header of config_full_pv_shoestring.json for the comment-tag convention used here ('skip — preset default' / 'skip — class default' / 'VARIED').

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. SH-proximal channels are 64-104m wide -> 6-10 cells (W:D=22, depth=4m). Migration step ~25m -> 2.5 cells/event.

preset._comment_: Pyrcz 2004 proximal sand-rich sheet architecture. Locks rest of kwargs to SH_PROXIMAL baseline unless overridden below.

NTGtarget._comment_: VARIED. SH-proximal NTG range — sand sheet with avulsion, baseline 0.40.

mCHsinu._comment_: VARIED. Mean sinuosity. Baseline 1.2 (low — proximal channels stay relatively straight).

mCHwdratio._comment_: VARIED. SH-proximal W:D. Very wide channels — proximal sand-rich signature.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

probAvulInside._comment_: VARIED. High in-belt avulsion is the proximal signature (densely stacked channels per level). Baseline 0.35.

mFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Abandoned-channel mud-plug fraction. Widened to [0.05, 0.4] for visual variability.

mdistMigrate._comment_: VARIED. Migration distance per event (m). Baseline 25.

azimuth._comment_: VARIED. Flow direction (deg, clockwise from +x). Channels are not 180-symmetric so the full circle matters.

nlevel._comment_: AUTO. nlevel = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper channels stack fewer levels; shallower stack more — basin always full.

ntime._comment_: per-level event budget (50 events × nlevel total). Sized so each level fills with the preset's typical channel density.

ntime_per_level._comment_: TRUE so every level gets its own event budget (independent of how many lower levels consumed). Without this, deep levels starve when NTGtarget=0.99 stops never firing.

probAvulOutside._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.10 -> 0.08.

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.15 -> 0.1.

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 3.0 (large W:D variability — distinctive).

stdevdistMigrate._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 10 -> 8.

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.4 (small levees in proximal).

stdevLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.2 -> 0.1.

mLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 40 -> 20.

mLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.5 -> 0.2.

mLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.3 -> 0.0 (symmetric levees in proximal).

stdevLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.1 -> 0.0.

mCSnum._comment_: splays disabled — adds visual complexity without diagnostic value; future versions can re-enable.

stdevFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0 -> 0.05.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0078 -> 0.0036.

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 2.0 -> 10.0.
